title: Apple reports record Q1 revenue of $124 billion driven by iPhone sales
summary: Apple Inc. posted record fiscal first-quarter revenue of $124 billion, surpassing analyst expectations on strong iPhone and services growth.
content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) reported fiscal first-quarter revenue of $124B versus $122B expected. iPhone revenue grew 6% YoY. Services hit a new all-time high.

title: Microsoft beats earnings estimates on Azure cloud growth
summary: Microsoft reported quarterly earnings above estimates, with Azure revenue growing 31% year over year.
content: Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) posted EPS of $3.20 vs $3.10 expected. Azure cloud revenue grew 31%. Guidance for next quarter raised.

title: NVIDIA cuts revenue guidance citing weak data center demand
summary: NVIDIA issued a profit warning, lowering its revenue forecast by 15% due to softening enterprise GPU demand.
content: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) revised its quarterly guidance downward, citing weaker-than-expected data center orders. Shares fell 8% in after-hours trading.

title: Tesla recalls 2 million vehicles over Autopilot safety concerns
summary: Tesla announced a recall of 2 million cars in the US following an NHTSA investigation into Autopilot crashes.
content: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) will recall nearly all its US vehicles to fix Autopilot software flaws identified by federal regulators.

title: EU fines Apple 1.8 billion euros for music streaming antitrust violation
summary: The European Commission imposed a 1.8B euro fine on Apple for abusing its dominant position in the music streaming market.
content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) was fined 1.8 billion euros by the European Commission over App Store rules that hindered competing music streaming services.

title: Microsoft to acquire cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike for $35 billion
summary: Microsoft announced an agreement to acquire CrowdStrike in a $35B all-stock deal.
content: Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) said it has agreed to buy cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike for $35 billion, expanding its security portfolio.

title: Major ransomware attack disrupts US tech companies
summary: A coordinated ransomware campaign has hit several major US technology firms, disrupting cloud operations.
content: Security researchers report that a sophisticated ransomware attack exploiting a zero-day vulnerability has affected multiple Silicon Valley tech firms.

title: Federal Reserve raises interest rates by 50 basis points
summary: The Fed hiked rates by 50bp, signaling continued tightening to combat inflation.
content: The Federal Reserve raised its benchmark interest rate by 50 basis points, the largest hike in two decades, as inflation remained above target.

title: Tesla announces $5 billion share buyback program
summary: Tesla's board approved a $5B share repurchase plan, the company's first ever buyback.
content: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) announced its inaugural share buyback program of $5 billion, signaling confidence in long-term cash generation.

title: Apple CEO Tim Cook to step down in 2026, successor named
summary: Apple announced a leadership transition with COO Jeff Williams set to become CEO next year.
content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) confirmed that Tim Cook will retire as CEO in 2026, with current COO Jeff Williams taking over the role.

title: New species of deep-sea fish discovered near Mariana Trench
summary: Marine biologists identified a new bioluminescent fish species at depths of 4000 meters.
content: Researchers from a marine institute announced the discovery during an expedition in the Pacific Ocean.

title: Brazilian football team wins Copa Libertadores final
summary: Flamengo defeated Boca Juniors 2-1 to claim their fourth Copa Libertadores title.
content: The match took place at the Maracana stadium in front of 70,000 fans.

title: Hollywood actors strike enters fourth month with no resolution in sight
summary: SAG-AFTRA negotiations with studios remain stalled over AI usage and residuals.
content: The Screen Actors Guild strike continues to delay film and TV productions across major studios.

title: TSMC reports chip shortage may impact iPhone production in 2026
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor warned of supply constraints that could affect Apple's iPhone manufacturing schedule.
content: TSMC, Apple's main chip supplier, said capacity constraints in 3nm production could delay iPhone shipments in early 2026.

title: Class action lawsuit filed against Tesla over self-driving claims
summary: Investors filed a securities fraud class action alleging Tesla misled shareholders about Full Self-Driving capabilities.
content: The lawsuit, filed in California, accuses Tesla Inc. (TSLA) executives of making materially false statements about FSD progress.

title: Banco Santander supera previsiones con beneficio récord de 12.000 millones
summary: Santander batió las estimaciones del consenso con un beneficio neto de 12.000 millones de euros en 2025.
content: Banco Santander (SAN) registró un beneficio neto récord de 12.000 millones de euros, un 18% más que el año anterior, impulsado por Brasil y México.

title: BBVA lanza una OPA hostil sobre Banco Sabadell por 12.000 millones
summary: BBVA presenta una oferta pública de adquisición hostil sobre Sabadell tras el rechazo del consejo.
content: BBVA anunció una OPA hostil sobre Banco Sabadell valorada en 12.000 millones de euros, dirigida directamente a los accionistas.

title: Inditex anuncia un dividendo extraordinario de 1,5 euros por acción
summary: Inditex distribuirá un dividendo extraordinario tras un año récord de ventas.
content: Industria de Diseño Textil (ITX) propondrá a la junta un dividendo extraordinario de 1,5 euros por acción gracias al fuerte crecimiento de Zara.

title: Iberdrola sufre un ciberataque que afecta a sus sistemas de facturación
summary: Iberdrola confirma un ataque informático que ha comprometido datos de clientes en España.
content: Iberdrola (IBE) reportó un ciberincidente que afectó sus sistemas de facturación. La compañía investiga si hubo filtración de datos personales.

title: El BCE mantiene los tipos de interés en el 4% por tercera reunión consecutiva
summary: El Banco Central Europeo decidió mantener su tipo de referencia en el 4%, en línea con las expectativas del mercado.
content: El BCE mantuvo los tipos de interés sin cambios. Christine Lagarde indicó que recortes serán graduales y dependientes de los datos.

title: La CNMV multa a Banco Santander con 5 millones por infracciones MiFID
summary: La CNMV impuso una sanción de 5 millones de euros a Santander por incumplimientos en información a clientes.
content: La Comisión Nacional del Mercado de Valores sancionó a Banco Santander (SAN) por deficiencias en la idoneidad de productos vendidos a minoristas.

title: Inditex nombra nueva CEO tras la salida de Óscar García Maceiras
summary: El consejo de Inditex ha designado a Marta Ortega-Pérez como nueva consejera delegada.
content: Industria de Diseño Textil (ITX) anunció el cambio en la cúpula directiva. La nueva CEO asumirá funciones a partir de junio.

title: España gana el Mundial de balonmano por primera vez en su historia
summary: La selección española se proclamó campeona del mundo tras vencer a Dinamarca en la final.
content: El equipo nacional logró el título histórico en una final disputada en Oslo.

title: Repsol anuncia récord de producción en sus plantas españolas
summary: Repsol incrementa su producción de petróleo y gas en España un 12% interanual.
content: Repsol (REP) reportó un fuerte aumento de la producción nacional, aunque su impacto en grupo es limitado.

title: Iberdrola gana licitación de 5GW de energía eólica en Reino Unido
summary: Iberdrola se adjudica un contrato para construir 5GW de capacidad eólica offshore en aguas británicas.
content: Iberdrola (IBE) firmó un acuerdo con el gobierno británico para desarrollar el mayor parque eólico marino de Europa.

title: OPEC+ agrees to extend production cuts through 2026
summary: OPEC+ members agreed to extend voluntary oil production cuts of 2.2 million barrels per day until end of 2026.
content: The OPEC+ alliance, including Saudi Arabia and Russia, will maintain output cuts to support oil prices amid weakening global demand.

title: Exxon Mobil reports Q4 earnings missed estimates on lower refining margins
summary: ExxonMobil posted Q4 EPS of $2.10 vs $2.45 expected as refining margins compressed.
content: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) missed analyst estimates due to weaker downstream margins, despite stable upstream production.

title: Shell to spin off renewables division in major restructuring
summary: Shell announced plans to spin off its renewable energy business into a separate listed company by 2027.
content: Shell plc (SHEL) said the spin-off aims to unlock shareholder value by separating its low-carbon and traditional oil & gas businesses.

title: Repsol invertirá 5.000 millones en biocombustibles hasta 2030
summary: Repsol anuncia un plan estratégico de inversión masiva en biocombustibles avanzados.
content: Repsol (REP) destinará 5.000 millones de euros a su plan de biocombustibles, posicionándose como líder europeo en transición energética.

title: Massive oil spill off coast of Louisiana, ExxonMobil pipeline blamed
summary: An ExxonMobil pipeline ruptured causing a 200,000-barrel oil spill in the Gulf of Mexico.
content: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) confirmed a major pipeline leak. Cleanup costs and regulatory fines could exceed $1 billion.

title: EU passes new carbon border adjustment mechanism affecting oil imports
summary: The European Union approved CBAM extending carbon tariffs to refined oil products from 2027.
content: The new EU regulation will impose carbon border taxes on imported oil products, impacting global oil majors including Shell and Exxon.

title: Major cyberattack hits European energy grid operators
summary: A coordinated ransomware attack disrupted operations at several European grid operators.
content: Energy sector cyberattacks have intensified, with multiple utility operators reporting ransomware infections affecting SCADA systems.

title: Apple unveils new MacBook Pro with M5 chip
summary: Apple announced its next-generation MacBook Pro powered by the M5 silicon.
content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) introduced the new MacBook Pro lineup featuring the M5 chip with improved performance.

title: Strong winds disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz
summary: Severe weather in the Persian Gulf is causing delays for oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.
content: Shipping companies report 24-48 hour delays for crude oil tankers transiting the world's most important oil chokepoint.

title: Repsol nombra a Josu Jon Imaz nuevo presidente ejecutivo
summary: El consejo de Repsol designa a Imaz como nuevo presidente, sustituyendo a Antonio Brufau.
content: Repsol (REP) anunció el cambio en su cúpula directiva. Josu Jon Imaz asumirá la presidencia ejecutiva el próximo mes.

title: Google announces breakthrough in quantum computing chip
summary: Alphabet's quantum computing division unveiled a new processor with 1000 logical qubits.
content: Google (GOOGL) announced its quantum chip breakthrough, potentially threatening current cryptography and competing with NVIDIA in HPC workloads.

title: DOJ files antitrust lawsuit against Apple over App Store practices
summary: The US Department of Justice sued Apple alleging monopolistic practices in the smartphone market.
content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) faces a major antitrust lawsuit from the DOJ alleging that the company maintains an illegal monopoly in smartphones via App Store rules.

title: Bruselas multa a la banca europea por cártel de bonos soberanos
summary: La Comisión Europea sanciona a varios bancos europeos por manipular el mercado de deuda soberana.
content: Bruselas impuso multas millonarias a varios bancos europeos. BBVA y Santander figuran entre los sancionados, con multas combinadas superiores a 200 millones de euros.

title: El precio del algodón sube un 30% por sequía en Estados Unidos
summary: La sequía en Texas impulsa el precio del algodón a máximos de cinco años.
content: El encarecimiento de las materias primas textiles podría afectar a empresas como Inditex (ITX), que dependen del algodón en sus colecciones.

title: Weekend weather forecast: heavy rain expected in Northeast US
summary: Meteorologists predict heavy rainfall and possible flooding in the Northeast region this weekend.
content: The National Weather Service issued advisories for several states in the Northeast.
